mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO purchase_order_item ( purchase_order_id, medicine_id, batch_no, quantity, purchase_price, production_date, expiry_date, subtotal ) VALUES
( #{item.purchaseOrderId}, #{item.medicineId}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.purchasePrice}, #{item.productionDate}, #{item.expiryDate}, #{item.subtotal} )
mapper.select: SELECT poi.id, poi.medicine_id, m.medicine_name, poi.batch_no, poi.quantity, poi.purchase_price, poi.production_date, poi.expiry_date, poi.subtotal FROM purchase_order_item poi INNER JOIN medicine m ON poi.medicine_id = m.id WHERE poi.purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId} ORDER BY poi.id ASC
